component.name: Frame
component.summary: Native FFmpeg media converter for video, audio, images and subtitles

description.p: This is a community package of Frame, maintained independently and unaffiliated with the Frame developers. It repackages the official upstream Linux tarball unmodified at install time.
Frame is a native media conversion utility built in Rust. It provides a desktop interface for FFmpeg operations, with controls for video, audio, image, subtitle and metadata settings.

ul.li: Convert video, audio and image files through bundled FFmpeg and FFprobe binaries
Configure containers, codecs, bitrate or CRF, resolution, scaling, frame rate and pixel format
Edit audio, subtitle and metadata settings for supported media
Save reusable conversion presets and monitor conversion progress in the app

description.p: Permissions: by default this package grants display, audio, graphics acceleration and notifications only. Local files are expected to be opened and saved through the desktop portal. To work directly with persistent paths outside the sandbox, grant the needed folder with "flatpak override".
